entries.title: OpenClaw Just Got a Physical Body — DeepMirror Put It Inside a Robot
entries.concept: Open Claw started as a messaging agent on your phone.
entries.indicators: ["and rescue strategies in real time inside a Unitary robot with no human operator", "and rescue unit that can adjust its area coverage strategy in real time based on"]
entries.summary:
Open Claw started as a messaging agent on your phone.
60 days later, it's walking warehouse floors, conducting cargo audits, and adjusting search and rescue strategies in real time inside a Unitary robot with no human operator issuing commands.
On March 5th, Deep Mirror made that official.
And the implications go well beyond robotics.
Deep Mirror, a Hong Kong AI robotics company, announced full integration of OpenClaw into their physical AI stack on Unitry hardware.
The core problem they solved, LLMs are great at planning, but fall apart the moment that plan needs to execute in the physical world.
Open Claw is the bridge between reasoning and action.
And this deployment is the first time that bridge has been extended from the digital layer into real physical space.
Every robotics engineer working with large language models has hit the same wall.
You give the model a goal.

entries.title: OpenClaw v2026.3.7 Just Dropped — GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1, and a Fix That Was Driving Everyone Crazy
entries.concept: Open Claw just dropped V2026.3.7 and this one has GPT 5.4 support, Gemini 3.1 flashlight, a fix for the ACP binding bug that was breaking every restart, and a slim Docker build that finally stops the image from being absurdly oversized.
entries.summary:
Open Claw just dropped V2026.3.7 and this one has GPT 5.4 support, Gemini 3.1 flashlight, a fix for the ACP binding bug that was breaking every restart, and a slim Docker build that finally stops the image from being absurdly oversized.
Version 2026.3.7 shipped within the last 24 hours, and it is a focused release.
No massive breaking changes, no 150 fix change log.
Four targeted upgrades that directly address the most common pain points users have been hitting since 2026.3.2.
First, GBT 5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Flashlight both get official ACP bindings in this release.
If you are manually configuring these models through workarounds or community forks, that is now unnecessary.
Both models are first class citizens in the ACP layer with full official support.
Second, the ACP binding persistence fix.
Every time you restarted Open Claw, your ACP bindings reset, meaning any custom model routing, any specialized agent configuration tied to an ACP binding had to be manually reconfigured from scratch after every restart.
exactly as you'd expect them to.

entries.title: Oil Spikes 35%
entries.concept: Hey everyone and thanks for jumping back into the macroverse.
entries.summary:
Hey everyone and thanks for jumping back into the macroverse.
Today we're going to talk about oil and how it just had the largest rally in a single week since WTI started trading back in 1983.
We also offer other services as well.
Let's go ahead and jump in.
So, a week ago, one week ago, we made this video called the mechanism that ends business cycles.
And when I posted that video, the price of crude oil was $67.
Today a one week later it is now $91.
Again this is the largest weekly spike in history for oil.
Now there's going to lot of there will be a lot of people that sort of look at this and and rightfully say well it's still less than 100.
It's not where it was in 2022.

entries.title: qbyQ8322m-M
entries.concept: That's right guys, there is a new version of the gshian channel strategy.
entries.summary:
That's right guys, there is a new version of the gshian channel strategy.
You asked for it and now it has shorting logic.
Yes, on Bitcoin it makes more profit and has a lower draw down than the previous version.
On AEX it has about double the profit with the same max draw down.
The same is true for Fetchai where it has a higher profit with the same draw down.
But is it better than the previous version on more than those assets?
And why did it take me so long to create a shorting version of this freaking strategy?
And also, which one is the absolute best trading strategy from my universe and in the entire industry in my opinion.
I asked the AI, it ran the back tests and the results are in.
I will answer all of these questions and more in this video and of course as well how you can get access to this new strategy right now.

entries.summary:

It tells you exactly when the trend is up or when the trend is down.
I will teach you a very accurate trading strategy based on this indicator.
This indicator is a new version of super trend.
As you know, super trend is a famous trend indicator and many traders use super trend for trend identification.
But this new version of super trend is much better than the original one.
To add it to your chart here, you just need to click on indicators and search pivot points super trend.
This one which is an editor specs indicator and written by lonesome deu.
It is already a popular indicator on trading view and it is used by many traders.
All right, as you can see it is overlaid on the price chart.
